creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-06-06 13:27:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-HTML-FillInForm-ForceUTF8 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                     pkg-plist 
  Log:
  HTML::FillInForm::ForceUTF8 is a subclass of HTML::FillInForm that forces
  utf8 flag on html and parameters. This allows you to prevent filling
  garbled result.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/HTML-FillInForm-ForceUTF8/
  
  PR:             ports/113357
  Submitted by:   Tomoyuki Sakurai <cherry at trombik.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1836    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/www/p5-HTML-FillInForm-ForceUTF8/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-HTML-FillInForm-ForceUTF8/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-HTML-FillInForm-ForceUTF8/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-HTML-FillInForm-ForceUTF8/pkg-plist (new)
